summary: Tested NumpadModal feature for tablet-friendly number input. All core functionality verified: numpad opens on click, displays current value, number keys (0-9) work, decimal key adds dot (only once), backspace removes digits, Done button confirms value and fills input, X button closes without saving, re-clicking input reopens with existing value. JetBrains Mono font confirmed applied to .numpad-digits and .mono classes.
passed_tests: NumpadModal opens when clicking NumericInput fields
Numpad displays current value at top in numpad-display area
Number keys (0-9) append digits to display correctly
Decimal key (.) adds dot to display
Decimal key prevents adding second dot (only one allowed)
Backspace key removes last digit from display
Clear button (X next to value) clears entire display
Done button confirms value and fills the input field
Done button closes the numpad modal
Close button (X in header) closes numpad without saving
Re-clicking input reopens numpad with existing value preserved
RateManagement page: NumericInput works for rate inputs (rate-normal-*, rate-ajpl-*, rate-buyback-*)
RateManagement page: NumericInput works for new-purity-percent input
ItemCalculator page: NumericInput works for gross-weight-input
ItemCalculator page: NumericInput works for less-input
ItemCalculator page: NumericInput works for making charge value inputs
ItemCalculator page: NumericInput works for stone charge value inputs
ItemCalculator page: NumericInput works for studded charge inputs (carats, rate_per_carat)
MrpCalculator page: NumericInput works for mrp-gross-weight
MrpCalculator page: NumericInput works for mrp-price
MrpCalculator page: NumericInput works for discount inputs
MrpCalculator page: NumericInput works for studded weight inputs
BillPage: NumericInput works for ext-charge-amount (external charge)
BillPage: NumericInput works for og-value-input (Old Gold value)
JetBrains Mono font applied to .numpad-digits class
JetBrains Mono font applied to .mono class
Numpad label shows field name (e.g., 'GROSS WEIGHT (G)', '24KT RATE/10G', 'MRP')
seed_data_creation: None - used existing bills and rate data
context_for_next_testing_agent: NumpadModal feature fully tested. Key components: NumpadContext.js (provider with openNumpad/closeNumpad/confirm), NumpadModal.js (phone-style numpad overlay), NumericInput.js (drop-in replacement for type=number inputs). All data-testid attributes working: numpad-modal, numpad-display, numpad-key-{0-9,.backspace}, numpad-enter, numpad-close, numpad-clear. JetBrains Mono font loaded via Google Fonts and applied to .numpad-digits and .mono classes. NumericInput uses readOnly and inputMode='none' to prevent native keyboard.

components_tested.notes: Shows current value with JetBrains Mono font

font_verification.numpad_digits_class: JetBrains Mono applied - verified via computed style
font_verification.mono_class: JetBrains Mono applied - verified via computed style

mocked_apis.OTP_delivery: OTP codes visible via GET /api/admin/pending-otps instead of actual SMS delivery
